mapper.insert: insert into subscription_change_requests ( subscription_change_request_id, company_id, subscription_id, old_plan_id, new_plan_id, billing_cycle, invoice_id, status, requested_by, failure_reason, requested_at, applied_at, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{subscriptionChangeRequestId}, #{companyId}, #{subscriptionId}, #{oldPlanId}, #{newPlanId}, #{billingCycle}, #{invoiceId}, #{status}, #{requestedBy}, #{failureReason}, #{requestedAt}, #{appliedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: select * from subscription_change_requests where company_id = #{companyId} and subscription_id = #{subscriptionId} and status = 'PENDING_PAYMENT' order by created_at desc limit 1
